notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Riley Greene scores. Wenceel Pérez out at 2nd. Spencer Torkelson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry grounds out, third baseman Maikel Garcia to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith grounds out, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Michael Massey scores. Kyle Isbel to 3rd. Kyle Isbel advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Wenceel Pérez.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Michael Massey scores. Kyle Isbel to 3rd. Kyle Isbel advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Wenceel Pérez.

notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter flies out to right fielder Jac Caglianone.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith pops out to third baseman Maikel Garcia.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel singles on a ground ball to left fielder Riley Greene. Nick Loftin scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Michael Massey scores. Kyle Isbel to 3rd. Kyle Isbel advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Wenceel Pérez.
